NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION_ID="22.04"

VERSION_CODENAME=jammy
ID=ubuntu
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://help.ubuntu.com/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/"

notes: All measured commands go through api.v1.shell with LayerStack snapshot lease, overlay upper/work allocation, eosd ns-runner, capture, OCC publish, and cleanup.
This is not the future PTY session implementation; Rust PTY exec_command/write_stdin is not implemented yet.
